changelog: Ticket detail: company dropdown moved to visible sidebar (no longer hidden in More options)
Timer button: fixed height — no size jump between running/paused/stopped states
Admin System tab: advanced settings (background tasks, manual update, backups) collapsed under expandable section
Agent Connect: shows agent picker or empty state instead of error redirect when no ID provided
Install wizard: improved microcopy — friendlier error messages, step descriptions, button labels
Background operations (update check, pseudo-cron) moved from header.php to index.php front controller
Fix: shared/public report showing 0 USD — now falls back to organization billable rate
Fix: assigned users always have access to their tickets
